message:
feat(ffs-core): high-level read_file by inode number (bd-2q7)

Add OpenFs::read_file(cx, ino, offset, size) that combines inode read,
directory check, and extent-based file data read into a single call.
Returns FfsError::IsDirectory for directory inodes.

3 new tests: full read, partial read with offset, directory rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
